pkgmetadata.longdescription: ---This guide will help you setup the Ingestion framework and connectors---[Python version 3.7+](httpsimg.shields.iobadgepython-3.72B-blue)OpenMetadata Ingestion is a simple framework to build connectors and ingest metadata of various systems through OpenMetadata APIs. It could be used in an orchestration framework(e.g. Apache Airflow) to ingest metadata.Prerequisites- Python gt 3.7.x DocsPlease refer to the documentation here httpsdocs.open-metadata.orgconnectorsimg referrerpolicyno-referrer-when-downgrade srchttpsstatic.scarf.sha.pngx-pxidc1a30c7c-6dc7-4928-95bf-6ee08ca6aa6a
